arts.ttl: Tottenham official takes on transfer hunt in Lisbon – On chase for ‘potential reinforcements’
arts.sum: Tottenham had a scout in attendance this week to watch Sporting Club de Portugal’s 1-0 win over Porto. That’s according to A Bola, who say Tottenham were one of several sides with a scout at the game alongside the likes of Manchester United.
